# Add recurring transaction management

## Summary

Implement recurring transaction concepts for regular inflows and outflows.

## Why

Recurring transactions form the bridge between contracts, actual account movements, fixed-cost analysis, and liquidity forecasting.

## Scope

- define recurring transaction templates or patterns
- support expected inflows and expected outflows
- define links between recurring transactions, contracts, and actual bookings
- define how recurring items support forecasting and reconciliation

## Acceptance Criteria

- recurring transaction requirements are documented
- links to contracts and actual bookings are defined conceptually
- support for inflows and outflows is explicit
- the output supports later forecasting and variance analysis features
